info.name: SomSpot API
info.description: SomSpot (taatiko12) backend — consumer, merchant & creator APIs. Set {{baseUrl}} and the role tokens after logging in.

request.description: Dev returns data.devCode. role can be USER | MERCHANT | CREATOR.
Copy data.accessToken to the matching role token.

body.raw:
{
  "business": "{{businessId}}",
  "title": "20% Off Family Platter",
  "discountLabel": "20%",
  "description": "Roasted goat, rice & salad.",
  "terms": "Dine-in only. One claim per customer.",
  "endAt": "2026-12-31T23:59:59.000Z",
  "claimLimitPerUser": 1,
  "estimatedValue": 12
}

request.description: Set Authorization header to REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_AUTH value in production. app_user_id must equal the merchant's User _id.

body.raw:
{
  "business": "{{businessId}}",
  "name": "BOGO Pizza Promo",
  "about": "Promote our BOGO pizza offer.",
  "videoLengthSec": 30,
  "targetCreators": 5,
  "pricePerClaim": 5,
  "offer": "{{offerId}}"
}
